Ashker v. McGrath | (2003-09-10) | 9th Cir. | Lead Opinion

MEMORANDUM **

Todd Lewis Ashker (“Ashker”) appeals the district court’s determination that his April 20, 2001 habeas corpus petition under 28 U.S.C. § 22541 was barred by the one-year statute of limitations set out in Section 2244(d).
